input: Machine Learning Taxonomy & Roadmap: Three branches — Supervised Learning (labeled data): Classical ML (Linear/Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, SVM) and Deep Learning (Dense Networks, RNNs/LSTM, CNNs, Transformers). Unsupervised Learning (no labels): Clustering (K-means, DBSCAN), Dimensionality Reduction (PCA, t-SNE), Anomaly Detection. Reinforcement Learning (learn from environment): Value-based (DQN), Policy-based (PPO, A2C), applications in Game AI (RLGym), Robotics, Trading. Key concepts: epochs (one pass through dataset), iterations (one weight update), batch (subset per iteration), hyperparameters (learning rate, batch size). Classical ML good for structured/tabular data. Deep learning excels with large datasets, complex patterns, raw data (images, audio, text).
